query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_TYPE 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND COLUMN_NAME = 'uploadDate'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2R5G6YVYACRzXTL.b06ea9fdb291 --database GZgYwiZhXgGduuvTzWkwoM --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, COLUMN_TYPE 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND COLUMN_NAME = 'uploadDate'
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
